clusters.justification: These terms broadly co-activate within the extended amygdala-insular-cingulate circuitry, representing the overarching macro-domain of processing, experiencing, and regulating valenced physiological states.
These terms reliably co-activate mesolimbic, striatal, and orbitofrontal circuitry, reflecting the high-level computation of subjective utility and incentive salience to guide goal-directed behavior.
These terms functionally converge on the medial prefrontal and temporoparietal nodes of transmodal cortex, subserving the integrated macro-domain of self-referential and interpersonal representation.
